flowchart: Layout Mount -> AuthProvider Mount -> Instance Init -> Persistence Config -> register onAuthStateChanged -> getRedirectResult (Global) -> Page Mount -> getRedirectResult (Local Page) -> Render UI

execution_order.2: Auth instance creation and persistence setting in auth.ts
execution_order.6: Page-level useEffect execution in login2/page.tsx or cadastro/page.tsx

risks_detected.description: getRedirectResult is being called simultaneously in auth-context.tsx and within individual pages (login2/page.tsx and cadastro/page.tsx). Since the redirect token is consumed upon the first call, subsequent calls return null.
risks_detected.evidence: Duplicate useEffect blocks found in src/firebase/auth-context.tsx (L46) and src/app/login2/page.tsx (L38).

risks_detected.description: Redundant app initialization logic exists in src/firebase/apps.ts which is currently unused but present in the codebase.
The hook use-user.tsx in src/firebase/auth/ is not exported or used by the main index.ts.
